reviews.text:
Adam is a genuine, down-to-earth person who has absolutely mastered the art of capturing love while making the entire experience a blast. From the moment we met him, we knew we didn’t need to look any further. He made the whole process effortless. He suggested perfect locations that matched exactly what we envisioned, and he completely understood the environment and vibe we were going for.
He provided us with an organized portal full of recommendations—hair and makeup, florists, and anything else we could possibly need in the area. He even included a super helpful “just in case” packing list, which was a lifesaver for us nocluers.
Adam brought so much fun, laughter, and energy to our day. Not one moment felt dull or awkward nor did we feel uncomfortable in our own skin. His enthusiasm fueled the whole experience and helped him capture our relationship perfectly.
Our photos are unbelievable. We are over the moon with how everything turned out and will recommend him to absolutely everyone. Our day was truly unforgettable, and Adam captured it with a level of talent and joy that is unmatched.
Thank you, Adam!!
“The Missing Ring Couple… but Not Missing the Perfect Photographer!”

Going into the process of planning our elopement, I was overwhelmed with just about everything — from everything that needed to get done, finding the perfect location in a state I’ve never lived in, what we even wanted to do, and getting all of that figured out in a timely manner. Adam made all of that a breeze! He did all of the organizing for me with an amazing timeline that broke everything down into manageable pieces. He took individualized information about my husband and I, and helped us make decisions and provided amazing recommendations! He was incredibly easy to work with throughout the entire process and was SUPER approachable. We were comfortable with him immediately and really enjoyed the experience, and I think a lot of that had to do with how comfortable he made us. I was very stressed about the photos and Adam did a FANTASTIC job making sure they were perfect, both posed and candid to perfection. If I’m being totally honest, my husband and I aren’t really photo people. We hate taking photos and are always those people to forget to capture events in that way, but I knew that photos and our choice in photographer were going to be one of the MOST important decisions for our elopement. It was something that I was really worried about, but Adam made the experience so much more comfortable and easy than I thought it would be. The time FLEW by and we had such a blast! Adam was amazing at coordinating everything and making the entire day so much easier for me. He even went out of his way for me last minute to capture a surprise wedding gift for my husband, and I will be forever grateful for just how amazing that was and how much it meant to me. I absolutely adore our sneak peeks and can’t wait to see the rest of our photos! If I had to do it all over again, it wouldn’t change a thing. I’m so happy we chose Adam and I know they’re going to be amazing!!

Book him. Book him right now, or you're definitely going to regret it!!

Here's my proof -
My husband and I are from Pennsylvania. We eloped on June 12, 2024, in Breckenridge, Colorado, with Adam as our Elopement Photographer.
We did not want to have a traditional big wedding with all the family members and vendors because that's not our style. We wanted an adventurous, sightseeing, no-judgment mountain elopement with our closest friends and family… and that is exactly what Adam provided for us.
I have never worked with a more personable, thoughtful, efficient, committed, passionate, detail-oriented, creative, positive, and resilient professional in my life so far. These are only some of the many characteristics that describe Adam - he is a real visionary and seriously the best person all around! We could not have been blessed with a better photographer who carefully articulated our day.

Before starting to work with Adventure Amore, I was worried about planning an elopement out of state because I didn't know what I was doing or how to do it. This scared me and made me have second thoughts, but after speaking with Adam and having face-to-face video chats, I could feel the stress leaving my body! He reassured me of all my planning doubts, made sure to give detailed and tailored information regarding our location, timeline, and overall plan, and gave us access to all of his resources, suggestions, ideas, 'know how's,' and checklists of absolutely everything we could possibly need throughout our elopement planning process. That constant reassurance and communication with him helped keep my mind at ease and excited me to get married. Adam's communication and all of his other talents are absolutely stellar.
When the big day finally came, I was more excited to meet Adam than to get married, lol! As soon as Adam arrived, the energy and vibe went from stressful and heavy to light, fun, and happy instantly - I could feel all the worry and anxiety floating away. He turned into our best friend throughout the day, and I think all of our bellies hurt from laughing so hard! Adam created exactly what we were dreaming of and made it into our elopement reality while maintaining a loving, happy, adventurous environment and vibe throughout the whole thing. I am so grateful for Adam and what he has provided for us; I will seriously never get sick of looking back at my photos and reliving the best and most amazing day of my life over and over again. I love sharing my elopement story with my friends and family, and I will probably tell it one hundred times. I will never forget his hard work, dedication, and love for his work and the people he meets. I guarantee he will go above and beyond every time to provide you with your dream wedding and photos because he seriously LOVES what he does, and he does a DAMN GOOD job.

Adam, thank you for everything you have done for us. We will be forever grateful for you and the memories you've provided us with.

Where do I even begin?! I can not recommend him enough. He was helpful every step of the way. He wanted our day to be just as wonderful as we had imagined. This is our favorite memory together, and I think that's exactly what it should be.
Adam is really just so amazing. My husband always picks up on good energy in people, and after our first chat with Adam we knew he was going to be the perfect fit for us. We felt so comfortable just to be ourselves around him, and he was able to capture US and our love in photos. The love we have is so visible in the pictures. I am so thankful I will have them to last a lifetime. Don't search any further, Adam is the photographer you want!

Working with Adam was the best choice we made when it came to our wedding planning! We were really overwhelmed by the planning process, and he walked us through every step and made the whole experience fun and personalized. We brought a group of family and friends with us from Ohio to Colorado for our wedding in Breckenridge, and Adam found us the perfect place, helped coordinate every detail, and kept everyone laughing and having a blast all day! On our wedding day, the weather forecast took a turn for the windy, rainy, and snowy, AND a road closure almost derailed our location plans, but Adam helped us pivot and turned what we feared was the worst case scenario into the best day of our lives. To top it off, he even came back to meet us for a second day to do some photos hiking at our favorite place because of the insane weather on our actual wedding day.

In short, Adam is the BEST at what he does, and you will not regret working with him!
